claim_tested: fused single-launch GEMM+bias+GELU undercuts cuBLAS+epilogue 3-launch by >= 1.5x wall
result: ALL SHAPES FALSIFIED — fused 1.56x to 13.57x SLOWER (opposite direction)
method: cuEvent 20 warmup + 200 timed median, GPU 0% util pre-fire

numeric_correctness.status: abs_err <= 4e-7 across all shapes; per-row-scaled rel metric flags 256/512 as FAIL due to near-zero GELU outputs (metric artifact, same as round-3 attention)
numeric_correctness.note: swap to per-row-scaled+RMS metric would flip 256/512 to PASS; wall result unaffected (orders of magnitude)

root_cause: naive 16x16 single-warp scalar-fma GEMM inside fused kernel vs cuBLAS-grade SGEMM (mma.sync TF32/FP32 tiling, double-buffer, swizzle). Gap GROWS with size (1.57x at 256 -> 13.57x at FFN-shape), inverting the structural moat.
ruled_out_axis: epilogue-fusion structural moat (1 launch + 1x M*N C-write vs 3 launches + 3x M*N C-write) does NOT convert to wall when the inner GEMM is naive. The 66.667% launch+HBM reduction is real but dominated by GEMM efficiency gap. Same pattern as round-3/4/5/7 attention falsifications.
next_round_wedge: cuBLAS-grade fused GEMM internals (mma.sync.f32.f32 + 64x64 tiles + double-buffer + swizzle = transplant the N204 standalone-GEMM roofline toolkit into the epilogue-fusion path). The unop closure (PR #1686 + silicon fire PR #1691) unblocks negative bias/threshold literals along this path.
no_paper: RED closed-negative re-confirmation of the structural-moat-doesn't-convert pattern (5th time across attention rounds 3/4/5/7 + this BC3 epilogue); not a fresh disproof axis. paper_significance gate not met.
section_10_box_impact: untouched. The >= 30% whole-program-fusion advantage box stays [x] via F-FUSION-LAUNCH-AMORT-WALL (73-76%) which fired with a LIGHT inner kernel (no GEMM). BC3 GEMM-fusion is a separate axis where structural != wall when inner GEMM is naive.
